title: ClassBioArsenal
description: ClassBioarSenal is a combat and character development mod that features three core systems: player classes, monster levels & tags, and weapon/armor progression. It also supports highly customizable difficulty settings and gameplay via data packs.
body:
ClassBioarSenal Mod Introduction
ClassBioarSenal is a combat and character progression mod tailored for survival, RPG, and story-focused Minecraft servers.
Leveraging three core gameplay systems—player classes, mob levels & tags, and weapon & armor growth—it elevates vanilla survival gameplay into an immersive ARPG-style looting and grinding experience, adding depth and replayability to server adventures.
Core Gameplay Systems
1. Class System
The mod features a multi-tiered class framework paired with level progression mechanics. Each class grants players unique role 定位 (role positioning) and exclusive attribute bonuses, allowing them to specialize in roles like tank, damage dealer, or support based on their playstyle, and grow their capabilities as they level up their chosen class.
2. Mob Enhancement
All in-game mobs are upgraded with dynamic level scaling and random trait tags. This overhaul makes every combat encounter more thrilling and unpredictable—higher-level mobs with rare tags will pose greater challenges, while also rewarding players with more valuable loot, keeping battles from feeling repetitive.
3. Equipment Progression
Weapons and armor in ClassBioarSenal come with layered progression systems, including distinct rarity grades, level caps, and random powerful affixes. Players can farm high-quality gear from challenging mobs and customize their loadouts to match their class, creating unique builds that suit both PvE combat and server-specific gameplay scenarios.
High Customizability
Nearly every numerical value and gameplay rule in the mod is governed by data packs and configuration files. Server owners can effortlessly tweak difficulty settings, adjust mob strength, modify affix spawn rates, and even rebalance class bonuses to align the mod with their server’s unique theme and community preferences.
The spawn probability and strength parameters of mob affixes, equipment affixes, and weapon affixes are all fully editable via data packs. For comprehensive guidance on configuration and setup, server admins can consult the official wiki linked in the mod’s resource documentation.
Recent Update Log
Official Rename: Rebranded to ClassBioarSenal for clearer thematic recognition
Equipment Customization: Added support for custom rarity grading of weapons and armor, expanding build diversity
Data Pack Optimization: Implemented forced data pack loading to ensure mod configurations take effect stably
Bug Fixes: Resolved critical server-side loading errors that caused crashes and gameplay interruptions
Expanded Configs: Introduced more configurable parameters for mobs, classes, and equipment to further empower server customization
